title: Viking Therapeutics Reports Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Viking Therapeutics reported Q2 2024 R&D expenses of $23.8 million versus $13.9 million in Q2 2023, and G&A expenses of $10.3 million versus $9.8 million in Q2 2023. Net loss for Q2 was $22.3 million, or $0.20 per share, versus $19.2 million or $0.19 per share in Q2 2023. For the six months of 2024, R&D expenses totaled $47.9 million versus $24.9 million in H1 2023, and net loss was $49.6 million or $0.46 per share, versus $38.8 million or $0.44 per share in H1 2023. Cash, equivalents, and short-term investments reached $942 million as of June 30, 2024, up from $362 million at year-end 2023. In the Phase 2 VENTURE study, patients receiving VK2735 demonstrated statistically significant reductions in mean body weight from baseline, ranging up to 14.7%. The oral formulation showed dose dependent reductions in body weight, ranging up to 5.3% over 28 days. For NASH treatment, VK2809-treated patients demonstrated NASH resolution rates ranging from 63% to 75%, compared with 29% for placebo. Amylin agonist preclinical data showed up to 10% weight loss from baseline in diet-induced obese mice.
